## Add-on Information

**Name:**
**ID:** (lowercase, no spaces — used as the unique identifier)
**Type:** (panel / mcp-server / skill / bundle)
**Description:**

## Repository

**Link:** (public GitHub repo URL)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on a fresh Crow install
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Follows naming conventions (no conflicts with existing add-ons)
- [ ] Has a README with setup instructions
- [ ] Panel add-ons: works with both dark and light themes
- [ ] MCP server add-ons: Zod schemas with `.max()` constraints
- [ ] Skill add-ons: includes trigger patterns and tool references

## Screenshots / Demo

(If this is a Crow's Nest panel, include screenshots showing it in action)

## Additional Context

(Any additional information about the add-on)
